docs.title: 关于本项目
docs.text:
项目 说明 数据来源 GitHub Trending (gh search repos) AI 分析 MiniMax Coding Plan API 站点框架 Material for MkDocs 托管平台 GitHub Pages 更新频率 每天北京时间 9:00

📅 自动更新

每日北京时间 9:00 自动运行。数据来源 GitHub Trending，AI 分析由 MiniMax 大模型完成。

🌐 多语言

点击页面顶部导航栏的语言切换器可在中英文之间切换。

点击上方导航栏的「每日汇总」查看历史内容。

docs.title: AI + Code Daily Digest
docs.text: Daily collection of GitHub AI+Code trending open source projects, analyzed and summarized by MiniMax LLM to generate structured knowledge pages.

docs.title: About This Project
docs.text: Item Description Data Source GitHub Trending (gh search repos) AI Analysis MiniMax Coding Plan API Site Framework Material for MkDocs Hosting GitHub Pages Update Frequency Daily at 9:00 AM Beijing Time

docs.title: Technical Architecture
docs.text:
Rule Configuration (rules/ai-daily.yml)
    ↓
GitHub Actions (Scheduled Trigger)
    ↓
├─ gh search repos → Data Collection
├─ MiniMax API → AI Analysis & Markdown Generation
├─ Write to docs/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md
└─ mkdocs build → site/
    ↓
GitHub Pages Deployment

docs.title: Daily Summary
docs.text:
Automatically generated daily. Click a date to view detailed project list and AI analysis summary.

Auto Update

Runs automatically daily at 9:00 AM Beijing Time. Data from GitHub Trending, AI analysis powered by MiniMax LLM.

Click "Daily" in the navigation bar to view historical content.
